$comment: Bug-pattern concern tokens that are intentionally unwatched by any verifier. Use sparingly -- most fix-commit concerns SHOULD have a regression guard. Each waiver entry: {concern, reason}. Stale waivers (the concern no longer appears in the last 100 fix commits) FAIL so the list shrinks as the codebase moves on.

waivers.reason: mermaid diagram fixes -- covered by repo-mermaid-freshness via 'mermaid' token
verb form; the regression test for disambiguation lives in repo_mermaid_freshness.test.py
common subject-line word, not a concern
quantity word from 'four missed requires' -- not a concern
generic noun; specific helpers have specific verifiers
infra is the doc/PROXY_CONTEXTS.md default classification; covered by cross-context-isolation
covered by onboarding-flow shadow regression test
